file_name.description: The name of the file (with file extension).

description.description: A tag describing what the document is about (e.g. affidavit, etc.).

file_type.description: The mime type of the attachment (e.g. image/png).

file_url.description: The URL to download the attachment file.

created_at.description: Time at which the attachment was created.

requested_by.description: An object indicating the user or API key that created the attachment. See [Authentication](#client-apps).

type.description: The type of the creator (e.g., user, api_key).

owner_id.description: The identifier of the owner (only present for API key requests).

type.description: The event type associated with the attachment (e.g., attachment_created). This field is only present when the attachment is returned as part of an event.
